extra.reason: Fixed: claude profile ReadyPattern '>' -> 'Remote Control active' (matches the --remote-control footer present in both default and HTTP launch paths; '>' never matched v2.x glyph '❯'). Verified live: handshake now reaches idle, not failed. Regression test added in profile_test.go.

Fixed: added screen-quiescence working->idle transition to health monitor (quiescentIdle + idleQuiescence, per-session runState). Guarded by WorkingIndicator so a busy-but-quiet agent is not falsely idled; added WorkingIndicator 'esc to interrupt' to claude profile (codex already had 'Working'). Verified live on both agents incl. a 25s silent task that correctly stayed 'working'. Unit tests added in health/monitor_test.go.
